top_signals.title: Lost Gulf Oil Since Start of Iran War is Less Than Previously Thought
top_signals.summary: Since the start of the Iran war and Tehran's announcement that the Strait of Hormuz was "closed", the market has grappled to put a figure on lost crude supply and to predict the price of oil.Initial calculations were simple: add up all non-Iranian Gulf crude oil exports…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says peace deal will be signed Sunday after Iran said it remains cautious on timing
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that a deal to end the war with Iran will be signed on Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Venezuela: Trinidad and Tobago Oil Spill is Detrimental to Environment
top_signals.summary: Venezuela's government said on Friday that an oil spill originating from Trinidad and Tobago is putting fishing as well as the environment at risk."This event exceeds in magnitude the one that occurred in May and confirms the drift of pollutants toward Venezuelan waters…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump vows to seize Iran’s Kharg Island
top_signals.summary: Kharg Island, the linchpin of Iran’s oil industry, has once more come under focus amid a fraying ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
top_signals.summary: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/04 - BEEDS User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Environment – Statistical Taxonomy v1.3.1 FINAL
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Blockworks Acquires Messari, Combining the Two Largest Crypto Data Platforms
top_signals.summary: The acquisition unites the industry's broadest data and API platform with Blockworks' investor relations and disclosure infrastructure, creating a single system of record for onchain assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
top_signals.summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.
